comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Would it be ok to get this in after https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12966 ?
Too late (tag's already created, so commit ordering says that won't be in), but we have at least 2 more RCs so we should be fine
Did you update the minimum API version?

> Too late (tag's already created, so commit ordering says that won't be in), but we have at least 2 more RCs so we should be fine

sounds good. thanks

@Luap99 I'm hesitant to do it before final, because we're still appending version tags (`4.0.0-dev`, `4.0.0-rc1`) and I don't know what happens if we specify one of those as a minimum version. I do think that `v4.0.0` will definitely prevent a client with v4.0.0-dev as a version from connecting, so we can't do that.
I thought we fixed that so the -dev/-rc is trimmed from the version @jwhonce Do you remember this?

LGTM
and all happy green test buttons.  I'll let @mheon push that big shiny merge button and start a toast!
